mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO book_report ( member_idx, book_id, book_title, author_name, publisher, read_date, report_text, report_image1, report_image2, report_image3, is_public ) VALUES ( #{member_idx},
#{book_id},
NULL,
#{book_title}, #{author_name}, #{publisher}, #{read_date}, #{report_text}, #{report_image1}, #{report_image2}, #{report_image3}, #{is_public} )
mapper.select: SELECT br.*, b.book_title AS original_book_title FROM book_report br LEFT JOIN book b ON br.book_id = b.book_id WHERE br.report_id = #{report_id}

SELECT br.report_id, br.book_title, br.author_name, br.member_idx, br.write_date, br.is_public, b.book_title AS original_book_title FROM book_report br LEFT JOIN book b ON br.book_id = b.book_id ORDER BY br.report_id DESC
